versions.description: Connect chat to other services like Discord.
versions.configSchema: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","required":["discordChannelIdCustom"],"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"sendPlayerConnected":{"title":"sendPlayerConnected","description":"Send a message when a player connects.","default":true,"type":"boolean"},"sendPlayerDisconnected":{"title":"sendPlayerDisconnected","description":"Send a message when a player disconnects.","default":true,"type":"boolean"},"onlyGlobalChat":{"title":"onlyGlobalChat","description":"Only relay messages from global chat. (no team chat or private messages)","default":true,"type":"boolean"},"discordChannelIdCustom":{"title":"discordChannelIdCustom","description":"Custom Discord Channel Id","type":"string"},"newPlayerDiscordChannel":{"title":"newPlayerDiscordChannel","description":"Discord channel ID for new player announcements (leave empty to disable)","default":"","type":"string"},"newPlayerDiscordMessage":{"title":"newPlayerDiscordMessage","description":"New player Discord message. Use {player} and {server} as placeholders.","default":"🎆 **{player}** is a new player. Welcome to **{server}**!","type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":200}}}
